name: bob-is-unable
description: Never run out of tokens. Proactive context management, session handoff, and restoration for Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Never run out of tokens. Proactive context management and session handoff.
interface.longDescription: Prevents Claude Code token exhaustion through proactive compaction at 60%, CLAUDE.md compression, structured session handoff, and restoration protocols. Includes /bob command for instant context health checks.
